text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: wen
Date: Mon Oct  1 02:23:41 UTC 2018
New revision: 480996
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/480996

Log:
  A modern, feature-rich and highly-tunable Python client library for
  Apache Cassandra (2.1+) using exclusively Cassandra's binary protocol
  and Cassandra Query Language v3.

  WWW: https://github.com/datastax/python-driver

  PR:		231737
  Submitted by:	sergey@akhmatov.ru

  head/databases/py-cassandra-driver/
  head/databases/py-cassandra-driver/Makefile
  head/databases/py-cassandra-driver/distinfo
  head/databases/py-cassandra-driver/pkg-descr
